message:
test(readme): RuntimePolicy fields + EvidenceLedger multi-record path

RuntimePolicy has 3 public fields (mode, fail_closed_unknown_features,
hardened_join_row_cap) plus a Default impl. None of the field reads
or Default behavior were asserted. EvidenceLedger had only 1-record
exercise in fd90.32; multi-record accumulation order was uncovered.

Adds readme_runtime_policy_fields_round_trip — reachable via prelude
alone — that asserts:

RuntimePolicy:
- ::default() == ::strict() (Default impl contract)
- strict():    mode=Strict, fail_closed=true, cap=None
- hardened(Some(50000)): mode=Hardened, fail_closed=false, cap=50000
- hardened(None): cap stays None

EvidenceLedger:
- new().records() is empty
- 3 sequential decisions accumulate in push order:
  - records[0].issue.subject == "a" (first decide_unknown_feature)
  - records[1].issue.subject == "b" (second decide_unknown_feature)
  - records[2].issue.kind == JoinCardinality (decide_join_admission)

Locks the ordering contract so a regression that reordered records
or zeroed a single one would surface immediately.

Closes frankenpandas-fd90.52.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
